title: list-test-suites output
description: JSON Schema for the default (non-`--tsv`) stdout of scripts/list-test-suites.sh. The tool scans a root directory for cabal projects and emits, per project, its packages and their test suites together with the commands to run / stream / discover each suite, plus any orphan .cabal files referenced by no project.

root.description: Absolute path to the scanned root directory.

projects.description: One entry per discovered cabal project file (plus one synthetic implicit project when no cabal.project exists).

orphans.description: .cabal files found under root but referenced by no project's packages: list.

projectFile.description: Project file path relative to root (e.g. "cabal.project", "cabal.project.schema-gen"), or null for the implicit project when no cabal.project is present.

cabalFile.description: Path to the .cabal file, relative to root.

packageDir.description: Directory containing the .cabal file, relative to root.

testSuites.description: Test-suite stanzas in the package. Empty array when the package defines none.

mainIs.description: main-is path relative to the package dir, or the literal "MISSING" if the file could not be resolved on disk.

entryPoint.description: Classification of the suite's main module: STREAMING (uses defaultMainStreaming from convex-tasty-streaming), upstream (plain tasty defaultMain), unknown (neither detected), MISSING (main-is file absent).

runTestsCommand.description: Command to build & run the suite. Always present. Carries --project-file=<file> iff the package is exclusively owned by a non-default project.

streamTestsCommand.description: Command to run with streaming JSON output (--test-options=--streaming-json). Non-null ONLY for STREAMING suites; null otherwise.

discoverCommand.description: Command to statically list tests as JSON (--test-options=--list-tests-json). Non-null ONLY for STREAMING suites; null otherwise.

testSuite.comment: Invariant: streamTestsCommand and discoverCommand are strings iff entryPoint == "STREAMING", else null. The --streaming-json / --list-tests-json ingredients are provided only by the convex-tasty-streaming library.

cabalFile.description: Path to the orphan .cabal file, relative to root.

packageDir.description: Directory containing the orphan .cabal file, relative to root.
